title: Trophic Cascades Explained
script_summary: This script succinctly explains trophic cascades while maintaining an air of mystery and encouraging further exploration.

segments.voiceover: What if a tiny change could ripple through an entire ecosystem?
This is called a trophic cascade. It’s when the removal or addition of a predator affects multiple levels of the food chain.
Imagine wolves in Yellowstone. Removing them led to too many deer, which overgrazed, harming plant life.
This concept shows how interconnected nature is. A single species can shape entire ecosystems.
Get it? Every action has a reaction. The balance is delicate, and we’re often unaware of the impact.
Curious about more science like this? Like, share, and follow for more fascinating insights!
